class.name: SlotOverallWire
class.description: [SlotOverallWire] builds a closed slot wire defined by an overall [param width] and [param height]. The ends are analytic semicircular arcs and the middle section is a straight-sided strip.

method.name: build_slot_overall
method.description: Builds a slot profile with the given overall [param width] and [param height]. When [param width] equals [param height], the result degenerates to a circle. When [param plane] is omitted, the profile is built on the XY plane.
